tasks.title: Reject empty/whitespace content and tag values in validation functions
tasks.notes: Updated validateCreateInput and validateUpdateInput in src/utils/validation.ts to reject empty/whitespace content (trim check) and empty/whitespace-only tag values.

tasks.title: Add tests for empty/whitespace content and tag validation
tasks.notes: Added 4 unit tests to tests/validation.test.ts and 5 integration tests to tests/notes.test.ts covering all new validation cases.

tasks.title: VERIFY: Input Validation Hardening
tasks.notes: npm test: 33/33 tests passed, 2 suites. No regressions. Code pushed to origin.

tasks.title: Add GET /version endpoint
tasks.notes: Added GET /version to src/app.ts importing version from package.json; returns {name: 'fleet-e2e-toy', version: pkg.version}.

tasks.title: Add GET /help endpoint
tasks.notes: Added GET /help to src/app.ts returning routes array with all 8 routes (method, path, description, optional requestBody/responseShape).

tasks.title: Add integration tests for /version and /help
tasks.notes: Added 7 integration tests to tests/notes.test.ts covering /version (200, name/version values, matches package.json) and /help (200, routes array, 8+ entries, method/path/description fields).

tasks.title: VERIFY: API Metadata Endpoints
tasks.notes: npm test: 40/40 tests passed, 2 suites. No regressions. Code pushed to origin.
